title: Upon Nodes.
content:
Wherever Nodes does in the summer come,
    He prays his harvest may be well brought home.
    What store of corn has careful Nodes, think you,
    Whose field his foot is, and whose barn his shoe?
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon Nodes."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
